word: G1661 - ἐλεφάντινος - elephántinos - el-ef-an'-tee-nos - Of ivory

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐλεφάντινος

- Transliteration: Elephantinos

- Phonetic: el-ef-an'-tee-nos

- Definition:

1. of ivory

- Origin: "from elephas (an "elephant")"

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From ἔλεφας elephas (an elephant); elephantine that is (by implication) composed of ivory: - of ivory.
